short_description: Skincare is expensive and confusing. Many people never see a dermatologist and instead rely on inconsistent online advice. Claire is an AI-powered skincare assistant designed to help you directly from your phone. Using computer vision and multimodal language models, Claire analyzes skin photos alongside personal context like routine, lifestyle, and goals to provide tailored, safety-conscious guidance. Our MVP integrates a FastAPI backend, Swift app, and retrieval-augmented generation for grounded recommendations. Long term, we plan to train our own acne classification model to improve personalization and performance. Claire aims to make smarter skincare accessible, affordable, and data-driven for everyone.
